extraction.one_line_summary: KITTEL Marcel won the sprint while CARUSO Damiano stole back one second on KWIATKOWSKI Michał in the intermediate sprint bonus.
tactical_patterns: CARUSO Damiano tactically countered Sky's intermediate sprint dominance, stealing one second bonus to cut GC deficit mid-stage.
THOMAS Geraint suffered second mechanical/incident of race, revealing Sky's vulnerability when leader needs team support elsewhere.
GAVIRIA Fernando launched long-range sprint attack with EF education support, forcing early response before KITTEL counterattacked late.

rider_signals.KITTEL Marcel: positive: Demonstrated late-sprint acceleration advantage, able to come from behind and hold off closers on consecutive days
rider_signals.CARUSO Damiano: positive: Showed tactical awareness to exploit Sky's positional lapse at intermediate sprint for GC time gain
rider_signals.GAVIRIA Fernando: neutral: Attempted long-range sprint but faded, suggesting preference for longer finishing straights over tactical positioning battles
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: Third incident in penultimate stage indicates either positioning issues or persistent mechanical bad luck affecting GC reliability
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: positive: Demonstrated exceptional bike handling to bunny-hop crash debris and maintain position despite team disruption
